title: X-Token - REKT X2
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by price manipulation and sUSD debt swap on xSNX contract

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls callFunction() if msg.sender is not the expected flashloan contract address
prevention.trigger: callFunction() called with msg.sender != expected flashloan contract address

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls callFunction() if msg.sender is not the expected flashloan contract address
summary: The attacker used a flash loan to manipulate the SNX price and then swapped sUSD debt on the xSNX contract, exploiting an erroneously public function call. A guard could have blocked such transactions by ensuring the callFunction() can only be called by the expected flashloan contract.
